quadrantGuides.title: Lower supply-demand ratio + high sold rate
quadrantGuides.action: Small but clean market. Add targeted supply only when the pattern repeats.

quadrantGuides.title: High supply-demand ratio + high sold rate
quadrantGuides.action: Healthy core. Keep supply live and avoid over-discounting.

quadrantGuides.title: Lower supply-demand ratio + low sold rate
quadrantGuides.action: Do not add broad supply. Fix catalog, visibility, and pricing first.

quadrantGuides.title: High supply-demand ratio + conversion upside
quadrantGuides.action: Promising demand is present. Unlock conversion by checking price, ticket quality, seat info, and matching before adding more demand.
